link.title: Nginx: High-Performance Automation
link.description: Nginx is a powerful web server and reverse proxy that can handle high traffic with ease. In this section, you'll learn how to set up Nginx to serve your applications, configure it for load balancing, and optimize its performance. Whether you're deploying a simple static site or a complex microservices architecture, mastering Nginx will ensure your CodeHarborHub projects are fast, reliable, and scalable. Discover how to create server blocks, manage SSL certificates, and implement caching strategies to take your web hosting skills to the next level.
